metadata.purpose: derive circuit duties and screen candidate rating classes without hiding missing engineering inputs

availability_evidence.scope: official 252kV outdoor SF6 live-tank family and drawing only; current and breaking ratings not public on the cited page
official family-level availability up to 4000A standard-table current and 63kA; not an exact project configuration

numeric_checks.note: Nominal-voltage precheck only; highest-system-voltage input is pending.
Candidate current after one configured correction factor; missing verified correction keeps the final check pending.
Preliminary Ik-based course screening; contact-separation current is pending.
Course-only peak precheck; full renewable peak scope is pending.
Dynamic precheck only; final peak-current scope is incomplete.
Current-level screen only; I²t requires fault duration and equivalent thermal current.

final_checks.note: Nominal-voltage precheck only; highest-system-voltage input is pending.
Highest system voltage must be verified from the applicable standard.

Course-only peak precheck; full renewable peak scope is pending.
Dynamic precheck only; final peak-current scope is incomplete.
Current-level screen only; I²t requires fault duration and equivalent thermal current.
Protection time, breaker opening time, equivalent thermal current, and final rated duration are pending.
Candidate ambient limit and 41C current correction are not verified.
Project altitude and pollution level are not yet confirmed.
Renewable contribution or contact-separation current scope is incomplete.
Renewable dynamic peak and standard peak-factor treatment are incomplete.
Candidate evidence status is target_only; exact model evidence is required.

pending_final_inputs: highest system voltage classes and insulation levels
protection and breaker clearing times for thermal duty
altitude, pollution level, and 41C current correction
exact manufacturer models, verified datasheets, and dimensions
LGJ-400/50 corrected ampacity, thermal, mechanical, and corona data
CT/PT secondary allocation, accuracy, burden, and protection data
